# VARUNA Department - Standard Operating Procedures

## Customer Support Operations

### Ticket Handling
1. Receive customer inquiry
2. Acknowledge within 15 minutes
3. Categorize and prioritize
4. Research and investigate
5. Provide solution
6. Follow up with customer
7. Close ticket
8. Request feedback

### Escalation Process
1. Identify need for escalation
2. Notify manager
3. Brief escalation recipient
4. Transfer ownership
5. Monitor resolution
6. Update customer

## Public Relations

### Media Inquiry Response
1. Receive media inquiry
2. Acknowledge receipt
3. Prepare response with key stakeholders
4. Get approval if needed
5. Respond to media
6. Document interaction
7. Monitor coverage
